name: Universal MCP Workspace
description: Universal Coder workspace template with automatic Jira, Confluence, GitHub, Filesystem, and custom-script MCP installation. A multi-distro node/npm bootstrap (apt → apk → yum/dnf → nvm → binary fallback) ensures MCP servers install and run regardless of the base container image chosen.

mcp.notes: Filesystem MCP is enabled by default. GitHub, Jira, and Confluence MCP are enabled via template variables and require the corresponding token/URL inputs. Custom shell script MCP servers can be registered via mcp_custom_scripts_csv. The startup script performs a multi-distro node/npm bootstrap so MCP packages install on any container image.
